# Greenville Lawn Masters

> Greenville Lawn Masters is a lawn care and landscape maintenance company based in Mauldin, South Carolina (zip 29662), serving homeowners and businesses within 25 miles of Mauldin across the Greenville County area. Founded in 2024. Tagline: "Greenville's Lawn Perfected."

## Business Facts

- Business name: Greenville Lawn Masters
- Business type: Lawn care and landscape maintenance company (residential and commercial)
- Location: Mauldin, South Carolina 29662, United States
- Service radius: 25 miles of Mauldin, SC — including the surrounding Greenville County area
- Founded: 2024
- Estimates: Free written estimate within 24 hours of request
- Website: https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/
- Contact: https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/contact/

## Services

Greenville Lawn Masters offers 22 lawn, landscape, and exterior property services in Mauldin, SC and the surrounding Greenville County area:

### Lawn Care (https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/lawn-care-services/)
- Lawn Mowing — weekly, biweekly, or one-time mowing routes
- Fertilization & Weed Control — feeding and crabgrass prevention timed to grass type
- Grub Control & Lawn Disease Treatment — pest and fungus treatment for turf
- Aeration & Overseeding — core aeration and seeding for compacted or thin lawns
- Winter Lawn Preparation — seasonal treatments before cold weather
- Grass Seeding & Overseeding — bare spots, patchy areas, and full-lawn seeding
- Lawn Repair & Leveling — patch repair, bare-spot fixes, and topdressing
- Commercial Lawn Care — scheduled grounds maintenance for businesses, HOAs, and apartments

### Tree & Shrub Care (https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/tree-shrub-services/)
- Edging & String Trimming — crisp lawn lines plus debris blowing from hard surfaces
- Leaf Removal & Storm Debris Cleanup — leaf and storm cleanup for Mauldin properties
- Hedge & Shrub Trimming — pruning that keeps landscaping neat and healthy
- Tree Trimming & Brush Removal — small-tree trimming and brush clearing
- Pet Waste Removal — recurring yard sanitation add-on

### Standalone Services
- Spring & Fall Cleanup — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/spring-fall-cleanup/
- Mulch Installation — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/mulch-installation/
- Flower Bed & Shrub Planting — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/flower-bed-shrub-planting/
- Sod Installation — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/sod-installation/
- Pressure Washing — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/pressure-washing/
- Gutter Cleaning — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/gutter-cleaning/
- Fence Line Clearing & Debris Hauling — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/fence-line-clearing-debris-hauling/
- Soil Testing & Lime Application — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/soil-testing-lime-application/
- Dethatching — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/dethatching/

## Service Areas

- Mauldin, SC (primary) — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/service-areas/mauldin/

- All areas: https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/service-areas/

## Key Differentiators

- Free written estimate within 24 hours of every request
- One local crew for the whole property: turf, beds, hedges, gutters, and concrete surfaces on a single schedule
- Local knowledge of Upstate South Carolina conditions — red clay soil pH (soil testing and lime application), warm-season turf varieties, and heavy fall leaf drop
- Serves both residential properties and commercial grounds (HOAs, apartments, businesses)
